entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch workflowName="HR Source Joiner event" workflowRef="HR Source Joiner event"> <Variables> <Map> <entry key="identityName" value="Shiva Nattali"/> </Map> </Variables> </WorkflowLaunch>
